text: As I move through this sleek, modern corridor and step into this vibrant, information-rich exhibit, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean lines and reflective surfaces outside give way to the bold colors and intellectual energy inside. Surrounded by displays of research and creative inquiry, I feel invigorated, keenly aware of humanity’s drive to understand and innovate. Here, I feel both small and significant: just one mind, yet part of a collective push to know and connect.
